name: identity-firewall
description: Root automation scripts for the Identity Firewall workspace

scripts.build: node scripts/run-rust.mjs build --workspace && npm --prefix extension run build
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/run-rust.mjs check --workspace && npm --prefix extension run type-check
scripts.test: node scripts/run-rust.mjs test --workspace && npm --prefix extension run test
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
